item.title: I am in awe of them, and anyone, who has travelled to Gaza to help in their darkest hour
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: They'll stop kissing Trump's ass when you stop voting for them
item.description: Just because a candidate has an R (or a D for that matter) next to their name doesn't mean they will look out for you. In fact, historically, and this goes back decades, middle and lower-class Republicans have consistently voted against their best interests. It's staggering how many keep going back to the well for more, like the leopard isn't going to eat their face this time... To be frank, you brought this upon yourself, sir. I truly hope that your business survives the current mess we're in, but unfortunately, I think the hardships that you are experiencing are by design. At some point, your farm will probably be auctioned off to the highest bidder: probably a corporation or some other big fish that devours lives like yours on a daily basis. And, why? So that some asshole CEO's stock goes up a point or two. Wake up.
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1480 (friendship bracelet(
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I'm friends with/dated so many people with this disorder that I swear to god, "Do you know @CodyBurkett?" should be a diagnostic question.
Can't wait for the new site bob is working on.
It's so wild that every part of "sussy baka" can be traced back to an Indo-European root somehow.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Morning! What doing? Peekaboo" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Good News – The Parley's Wildlife Overpass In Utah Is Working
item.description: Utah Transportation: "Good News We Could All Use: The Parley's Wildlife Overpass Is Working." Thanks Blake Ledbetter (@blakethy) and @usuaggielife for leading the study. #awesome #animals #wildlife #aww #mildly_interesting

item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Telling it like it is.
item.description: As a member of the eX-Men myself, I approve of Nightcrawler's message. The amount of hate coming from the White House about 'the trans problem', the desperate push to frame gun violence as a trans problem, the vile narrative that we are mentally ill dangerous predators that 'somebody should look into' and 'do something about'... I'm getting 1930s-1940s vibes. Records of trans people date back to antiquity. There was even briefly a trans woman as Empress of Rome. We've always been here. We'll always be here. We aren't going away.
item.dc:creator: ThatOtherGirlYouKnow

Have a good day all, Yuzu
